title: Maple's Bee Collection
description: Seasonal bee variants with custom textures that change with the seasons! ✨🐝
body:
✨Make Your Minecraft World Bee-utiful🐝 

Custom designed bee textures to bring a little something extra to your gameplay.

 

🌱 The Sapling mod needs to be installed in order for this mod to work 🌱

 

 ⚙️This mod needs to be installed on both the client and the server so you can see the same textures as your friends 🤗

 

 

 

 

The bee variations spawn randomly across the world. 

The bees stay in their own skin when re-opening a world, collect 'm all! 🤗

🌸☀️🍂❄️

The textures will automatically change per season. There will also still be regular bees.

 

The season dates: day - month

🌸Spring:  01-03 / 31-05         ☀️Summer: 01-06 / 31-08 
🍂Autumn:  01-09 / 30-11          ❄️Winter:  01-12 / 28-02          

🎄Christmas: 01-12 / 26-12

 

There is also an added command for which hemisphere you prefer! Northern or Southern 😊 (Northern is selected automatically)


‼️🏷️If you want to keep a certain bee texture on a specific bee for the whole year make sure to give

them a name tag before the new season starts! Otherwise, they will change. ‼️🏷️

 

Commands
⚙️To customize your experience.

 

Admin Tools
/maplemods bee adminTools flipSeasonDatesToOtherHemisphere   | To change the hemisphere
/maplemods bee adminTools restAllLoadedEntityTextures   |  To reset the bee’s that are already loaded in the game
/maplemods bee adminTools reloadConfigFile  | To reload changes in the Config

 

Config Values
/maplemods bee setConfigValues showCurrentValues
/maplemods bee setConfigValues disableSeasonsDuringHoliday (false/true)  | Option to disable the mixture of the holidays and the seasonal textures.
/maplemods bee setConfigValues nameTagPreventsTexture (false/true)  | Option to save the texture with the name tag or to disable it.
/maplemods bee setConfigValues replaceSeasonalTextures  | To reload the textures after making a change.

 

Update Category Settings
/maplemods bee updateCategorySettings _default   | Disable or enable the original bee texture
/maplemods bee updateCategorySettings <category> (disable/enable/setDate)  | Customize the seasons

 

Update Texture Settings
/maplemods bee updateTextureSettings <texture> (disable/enable) | To specifically choose which textures to enable or disable

 

 

Very excited to finally design and launch my custom bees.

✨ Hope you enjoy seeing them fly by as much as I enjoyed creating them ✨

More mobs coming soon!
